Entry.JapaneseText: <Dio>
Entry.EnglishText: <Dio>

Entry.JapaneseText: エトス
Entry.EnglishText: Ethos

Entry.JapaneseText: <Cless>
Entry.EnglishText: <Cless>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Mel>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mel>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Arche>
Entry.EnglishText: <Arche>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Chester>
Entry.EnglishText: <Chester>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Claus>
Entry.EnglishText: <Claus>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Mint>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mint>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Suzu>
Entry.EnglishText: <Suzu>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Rondoline>
Entry.EnglishText: <Rondoline>

Entry.JapaneseText: はっ……今気付いたんだけど、 なんか今オレらすげーこと経験してねーか？
Entry.EnglishText: Oh! I've just noticed it now but man, it sure is awesome!

Entry.JapaneseText: すごい、こと？
Entry.EnglishText: Eh? Awesome?

Entry.JapaneseText: 時空戦士全員と一緒に旅してるんだぜ。 これってすごいことだよ！
Entry.EnglishText: All of the Eternal Heroes are here and they're traveling with us! This just can't get more awesome!

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕たちはずっとみんなで 一緒に旅してたからそうでもないけど……
Entry.EnglishText: Well, I've travelled with everyone for so long the feeling isn't quite the same. However...

Entry.JapaneseText: でもそう言われてみると、感動が、 心の奥から少しずつ湧いてくる気がするね
Entry.EnglishText: However, even if those are your words I can sense a deep feeling of nostalgia welling up.

Entry.JapaneseText: ユニット『美女魔女<Arche>とその仲間たちと 小さな英雄たち』だね
Entry.EnglishText: We're unit "Pretty Magical Soldier <Arche> Starring Friends And Smaller Heroes"!

Entry.JapaneseText: 異議あり！！ アホか、おまえは！
Entry.EnglishText: OBJECTION!! You are a dunce!

Entry.JapaneseText: アホとは何よ、アホとは！
Entry.EnglishText: Who you calling a dunce, you idiot?

Entry.JapaneseText: でも、びしっと決まるチーム名みたいなのが ほしいよね
Entry.EnglishText: Hey, thinking about it we could use a team name!

Entry.JapaneseText: チーム名ね……ま、私は何でもいいが
Entry.EnglishText: A team name, huh? To be honest, anything is ok with me.

Entry.JapaneseText: 『時空戦士』ではいけませんか？
Entry.EnglishText: So we're not the "Eternal Heroes"?

Entry.JapaneseText: 時間を移動していない私も 時空戦士でいいのでしょうか
Entry.EnglishText: Technically speaking, I have never travelled through time. Therefore the implication we are a group full of time travelers given by that name is incorrect.

Entry.JapaneseText: そう言えばそうだね
Entry.EnglishText: That's true, now that you mention it.

Entry.JapaneseText: それじゃあ、ここはその双子ちゃんに 決めてもらおうじゃないの
Entry.EnglishText: Then what if we let the wonder twins decide?

Entry.JapaneseText: え？ わ、わたしたちにですか？
Entry.EnglishText: Y-you mean us?

Entry.JapaneseText: オレら、勇気凛々胸いっぱい団だ！
Entry.EnglishText: Super Spirited Soldiers Filled With Awesome!

Entry.JapaneseText: それじゃダメだよ、名乗りをあげるときに、 ずばっと言いやすくないと！
Entry.EnglishText: That won't work! No one can say that name at all!

Entry.JapaneseText: それじゃあ、どんなのにするんだよ
Entry.EnglishText: Oh, good point. So you got any ideas?

Entry.JapaneseText: え、えっと…… フェアリー☆サークル、とか……
Entry.EnglishText: H-how about "Fairy☆Circle"!

Entry.JapaneseText: なんだよ、サークルって……
Entry.EnglishText: What? How does that even apply!?

Entry.JapaneseText: んじゃあ、次の会議まで 決めておくこと！
Entry.EnglishText: Uhm! Well, in that case let's adjourn this meeting for now. This will be decided in the next group meeting!

Entry.JapaneseText: ……次の会議って何だ……
Entry.EnglishText: ...She's not implying we'll keep doing this, right?
